manifest.name: ObShare

name: ObShare

releases.author: xigua222
releases.description:
Optimize code standardization, improve code performance, fix known bugs, and enhance user experience.
优化代码规范性，提升代码性能
修复已知 bug，改善用户体验

releases.author: xigua222
releases.description:
- Optimized settings interface with more logical function partitioning
- Added dual-link mode, supporting the uploading of all dual-linked sub-documents at the same time
- Optimized image upload experience, fixing the issue of pasted images failing to upload correctly
- Added Mermaid syntax adaptation, optimizing Mermaid unrecognition or display anomalies
- Added YAML adaptation
- Added SVG format image adaptation
- Optimized code style and conciseness to meet Obsidian official plugin review requirements
- Added review log (debug mode), making the entire upload process auditable
- 设置界面优化，功能分区更加合理
- 新增双链模式，支持将所有双链子文档一并上传
- 优化图片上传体验，修复粘贴图片无法正常上传的问题
- 新增 mermaid 语法适配，优化 mermaid 不可识别或者显示异常
- 新增 yaml 适配
- 新增对 SVG 格式图片适配
- 优化代码规范和精简性，以满足 Obsidian 官方插件审核要求
- 新增审查日志（debug 模式），上传过程全程可审计
感谢大家对obshare的支持，这个版本大幅补齐了体验短板，希望能够给大家更加丝滑、简单、极致的分享体验。

releases.author: xigua222
releases.description: Our first public release, which now includes all core features. We will continue to update based on community feedback.
